song: 19 - The Jolly Tar and The Milk Maid
comment: Published lyrics by Ira Gershwin. F major. 6/8 time (Allegretto scherzando). 4-page score. Duet with heavy verse stacking (30 stacked measures). Verse 1 = Milkmaid's perspective, Verse 2 = Jolly Tar's reply. Dal Segno structure with 1st/2nd endings. Pipeline has 157% coverage due to stacking. Most measures have 2 verses stacked; m3 has 3 verses. v1-only lyrics provided for all stacked measures. Many OCR errors in the stacked text: 'Ly' for 'ly', 'Ui' for 'ti', 'm' for 'my', etc.

1.comment: STACKED. Pipeline v1:['There'] v2:['The']. 1n+3r. PDF: v1='There' v2='The'. v1 only.

2.comment: STACKED. Pipeline v1:['was','a','Jol','Ly'] v2:['Jol','ly','Tar,','he']. 4n. PDF: v1='was a Jol-ly' v2='Jol-ly Tar, he'. Pipeline OCR: 'Ly' should be 'ly'.

3.comment: STACKED 3 verses. Pipeline v1:['Brit','ish','Tar','Who'] v2:['laugh','a','laugh.','Tis'] v3:['al','read','and','band']. 4n. PDF: v1='Brit-ish Tar who' v2='laughed a laugh. 'Tis' v3 is garbled. PDF actually shows only 2 verses here: v1='Brit-ish Tar who' v2='Tar, he laughed a laugh. 'Tis'. The v3 is pipeline contamination.

4.comment: STACKED. Pipeline v1:['met','a','milk','maid'] v2:['for','the','best,','my']. 4n. PDF: v1='met a milk maid' v2='for the best, my'. Correct.

5.comment: STACKED. Pipeline v1:['bon','ny.','He'] v2:['bon','ny,','That']. 4n (6 lyrics). PDF: v1='bon-ny.__ He' v2='bon-ny, That'. Pipeline correct for v1.

6.comment: STACKED. Pipeline v1:['said,','How','beau','Ui'] v2:['you',"won't",'be','m']. 4n. PDF: v1='said, "How beau-ti-' v2='you won't be my'. Pipeline OCR: 'Ui' for 'ti', 'm' for 'my'.

7.comment: STACKED. Pipeline v1:['ful','you','are','With','a'] v2:['bet','ter','half','With','a']. 5n. PDF: v1='ful you are!" With a' v2='bet-ter half." With a'. Pipeline missing closing quotes and punctuation.

8.comment: STACKED. Pipeline v1:['hey','and','a'] v2:['he','and','a']. 4n (3 lyrics each). PDF: v1='hey__ and a' v2='hey__ and a'. Pipeline v2 OCR: 'he' for 'hey'.

9.comment: STACKED. Pipeline v1:['non','ny,','With','a','a'] v2:['non','ny,','With','a']. 5n. PDF: v1='non-ny,__ With a' (held note). Pipeline has extra 'a' at end of v1.

10.comment: Pipeline: ['hey','and','a'] on 4n (3 lyrics). PDF: 'hey__ and a'. Correct.

11.comment: Pipeline: ['non','ny','Such'] on 4n (3 lyrics). PDF p96 system 1: 'non-ny!__ "Such' — missing exclamation and quote.

12.comment: Pipeline: ['gold','en','hair','I'] on 4n. PDF: 'gold-en hair I'. Correct.

13.comment: STACKED. Pipeline v1:['neer','did','see,','With'] v2:['see','ing','you','That']. 4n. PDF: v1='ne'er did see," With' v2='see-ing you That'. Pipeline OCR: 'neer' for 'ne'er', missing closing quote.

14.comment: STACKED. Pipeline v1:['to','shame','the'] v2:['Ive','a','wife','in']. 4n. PDF: v1='lips to shame the' v2='I've a wife in'. Pipeline v1 lost 'lips', v2 OCR: 'Ive' for 'I've'. v1 has only 3 lyrics on 4n — 'lips' was lost from prior measure overflow. Provide what fits.

15.comment: STACKED. Pipeline v1:['cher','ry.','Oh'] v2:['Ker','ry,','In']. 4n. PDF: v1='cher-ry.__ Oh,' v2='Ker-ry,__ In'. Pipeline missing comma after 'Oh'.

16.comment: Pipeline: ['bux','om','milk','maid,'] on 4n. PDF: 'bux-om milk maid,'. Correct.

17.comment: Pipeline: ['mar','ry','With','a'] on 5n (4 lyrics). PDF: 'mar-ry me!" With a'. Pipeline lost 'me!' and closing quote. 5 notes, 4 lyrics — 'me!' should be there. But pipeline shows only 4 lyric syllables on 5n.

18.comment: Pipeline v1:['down','a'] v2:['I'] on 3n (3 lyrics total). PDF: v1='down__ a' v2='I' (from the 'Spain and al-so Tim-buc-too!' verse line). Actually this is not stacked in the same way. PDF p96 system 3: 'down__ a'. Pipeline has 'down a' plus v2 'I' but only 3n. Actually the 2nd ending text is different. Keep v1.

19.comment: Pipeline: ['der','ry,','With','a'] on 5n (4 lyrics). PDF: 'der-ry,__ With a'. Correct.

20.comment: STACKED. Pipeline v1:['down,','a','down','a'] v2:['down,','a','down','a']. 4n. PDF: v1='down, a down a' v2='down, a down a'. Identical text, both verses same.

21.comment: STACKED. Pipeline v1:['der','ry!'] v2:['der','ry!']. 3n (2 lyrics each). PDF: 'der-ry!__'. Both verses same.

23.comment: STACKED. Pipeline v1:['Our'] v2:['hearts','Youve']. 2n+2r. PDF p97 Refrain: v1='"Our' v2='"You've'. Pipeline v2 OCR: 'Youve' for 'You've'. m23 has 2n. v1 only has 1 lyric on 2n.

24.comment: STACKED. Pipeline v1:['hearts','could','rhyme?','said'] v2:['got','me','think',"in'"] on 4n. PDF: v1='hearts could rhyme?" said' v2='got me think-in''. Pipeline v1 missing closing quote. v2 has curly apostrophe.

25.comment: STACKED. Pipeline v1:['she.','Tis'] v2:['twice;','Good']. 3n. PDF: v1='she. "'Tis' v2='twice; "Good-'. Pipeline lost opening quote marks.

26.comment: STACKED. Pipeline v1:['flat','tered',"I'm",'said'] v2:['bye','to','shoes','and']. 4n. PDF: v1='flat-tered I'm," said' v2='bye to shoes and'. Pipeline missing comma+quote after I'm.

27.comment: STACKED. Pipeline v1:['she,','But'] v2:['rice,','For']. 3n (2 lyrics each). PDF: v1='she, "But' v2='rice, "For'. Missing opening quotes.

28.comment: STACKED. Pipeline v1:['oh,','ah','me,','You'] v2:['oh,','ah','me,','Just']. 4n. PDF: v1='oh, ah me, You' v2='oh, ah me, Just'. Correct.

29.comment: STACKED. Pipeline v1:['see,','you','see,','You'] v2:['now,','you','see,','Just']. 4n. PDF: v1='see, you see, You' v2='now, you see, Just'. Correct.

30.comment: STACKED. Pipeline v1:['see,','you','see,','I'] v2:['now,','you','see,','I']. 4n. PDF: v1='see, you see, I' v2='now, you see, I'. Correct.

31.comment: STACKED. Pipeline v1:['hap','pen','to','be,','I'] v2:['hap','pen','to','be,','I']. 5n. PDF: v1='hap-pen to be, I' v2='hap-pen to be, I'. Identical. Correct.

32.comment: STACKED. Pipeline v1:['hap','pen','to','be','The'] v2:['hap','pen','to','be','The']. 5n. PDF: v1='hap-pen to be The' v2='hap-pen to be The'. Identical. Correct.

33.comment: STACKED. Pipeline v1:['moth','er','of','three;'] v2:['hus','band','of','three,']. 5n (4 lyrics each). PDF: v1='moth-er of three;' v2='hus-band of three,'. Correct. 4 lyrics on 5n (held note).

34.comment: STACKED. Pipeline v1:['wife','al','read','y','and'] v2:['spliced','al','read','y','and']. 5n. PDF: v1='A wife al-read-y, and' v2='A-spliced al-read-y, and'. Pipeline lost 'A' from v1. Pipeline has 5 lyrics on 5n, but PDF has 6 syllables ('A wife al-read-y and'). 5n limit means we can only fit 5.

35.comment: STACKED. Pipeline v1:['moth','er','of','three,','of'] v2:['bus','band','of','three,','of']. 5n. PDF: v1='moth-er of three, of' v2='hus-band of three, of'. Pipeline v2 OCR: 'bus' for 'hus'.

36.comment: STACKED. Pipeline v1:['three,','of','three,','Of'] v2:['three,','of','three,','of']. 4n. PDF: v1='three, of three, of' v2='three, of three, of'. Pipeline v1 has capitalized 'Of' — should be lowercase.

37.comment: STACKED. Pipeline v1:['three,','of','three,','of'] v2:['three,','of','three,','of']. 4n. PDF: v1='three, of three, of' v2='three, of three, of'. Correct.

38.comment: STACKED. Pipeline v1:['three,'] v2:['three,']. 1n. PDF: 'three,__' (held). Correct.

39.comment: Pipeline: ['moth','er','of'] on 4n (3 lyrics). PDF p98 1st ending: '__ The moth-er of'. 3 lyrics on first 3 of 4n+1r. But actually this is the 1st ending tag. 'The moth-er of' = 4 syllables but pipeline has 3.

43.comment: Pipeline: ['The','hus','band','of'] on 5n (4 lyrics). PDF p98 2nd ending: 'The hus-band of'. Correct.
